# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator username for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator password for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Deployment location."
      }
    },
    "serverVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "12.0",
      "allowedValues": [
        "12.0"
      ]
    },
    "databaseEdition": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "Premium"
      ]
    },
    "databaseRequestedServiceObjectiveName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "P1"
      ]
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure services and resources to access the server."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "firewallRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "[parameters('serverVersion')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "[variables('firewallRuleName')]",
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "sku": {
            "name": "[parameters('databaseRequestedServiceObjectiveName')]",
            "tier": "[parameters('databaseEdition')]"
          },
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
            "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
            "zoneRedundant": false,
            "readScale": "Disabled",
            "requestedBackupStorageRedundancy": "Local"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    },
    "databaseResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    },
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
